message:
Simplify topic hierarchy with declarative YAML configuration

Move topic configuration from TypeScript code to a declarative
src/topics.yaml file. Use Vite's ?raw import for compile-time YAML
parsing instead of runtime file I/O. Add proper TypeScript types for
sidebar items and topic configuration. Fix root path active state
detection in NavbarTopicList to handle both sidebar matching and
URL fallback. Centralize topic path configuration in astro.config.mjs.
Document the topics.yaml reference in CLAUDE.md.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,6 +13,7 @@ for Tenzir (https://tenzir.com).
 - Configuration: `/astro.config.mjs`
 - Styling: Custom CSS in `/src/styles/`
 - Sidebar: manually managed in `/src/sidebar.ts`. Add new pages here.
+- Topics: `/src/topics.yaml` defines the navigation topic hierarchy.
 
 ## Content Authoring

@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+# Topic hierarchy for the documentation site.
+# This file defines the structure - implementation details are handled in topics.ts.
+#
+# Each topic can have:
+#   icon:     Starlight icon name (required)
+#   link:     URL path (defaults to lowercase label, use / for root)
+#   sidebar:  Key from sidebar.ts for navigation items
+#   paths:    Glob patterns for pages not in sidebar (e.g., generated by plugins)
+#   children: Nested child topics
+
+Docs:
+  icon: open-book
+  link: /
+  children:
+    Guides:
+      icon: right-arrow
+      sidebar: guides
+    Tutorials:
+      icon: rocket
+      sidebar: tutorials
+    Explanations:
+      icon: information
+      sidebar: explanations
+    Reference:
+      icon: list-format
+      sidebar: reference
+      paths:
+        # OpenAPI paths (generated by starlight-openapi plugin)
+        - /reference/node/api
+        - /reference/node/api/**/*
+        - /reference/platform/api
+        - /reference/platform/api/**/*
+        # Auto-generated function/operator reference pages
+        - /reference/functions/**/*
+        - /reference/operators/**/*
+        - /reference/claude-plugins/**/*
+
+Integrations:
+  icon: puzzle
+  sidebar: integrations
+
+Changelog:
+  icon: pen
+  paths:
+    # Landing page uses splash template, needs explicit match
+    - /changelog
+  # Children are merged from sidebar-changelog.generated.ts
